name: Waimanalo Beach
desc: Beachfront section of Waimanalo — direct access to one of the most beautiful stretches of sand in Hawaii.
insider: The beach here is wide, long, and impossibly turquoise — consistently rated among the top 5 beaches in America
Sherwood Forest (Waimanalo Bay Beach Park) is the local name — ironwood trees provide perfect natural shade along the shore
Weekend camping is popular and city permits sell out fast — reserve well in advance, especially for holiday weekends
The sunrise over the ocean here is one of the earliest and most spectacular on Oahu — arrive by 5:45am for the full show
The shore break can be powerful — bodyboarders love it but it catches waders off guard, especially when surf is up
This stretch of beach was used in filming Hawaii Five-0 and Magnum P.I. — the scenery is that photogenic
There are no nearby restaurants or shops — pack everything you need including water, food, and sunscreen
The ironwood tree roots along the shoreline create natural benches and hammock spots — locals know the best trees
Strong onshore trade winds blow almost every afternoon — great for kite flying but plan your beach day for the morning
Homeless encampments have been an ongoing issue in the ironwood groves — stick to the main beach park areas
